title: Scientific Paper
description: Structured extraction schema for scientific paper metadata. A complex schema with 16 fields including arrays of nested objects for authors, references, and datasets.

title.description: Full title of the scientific paper

authors.description: List of paper authors with their affiliations and roles

is_corresponding.description: Whether this author is the corresponding author

abstract.description: Full abstract text summarizing the paper's contributions

publication_venue.description: Journal name, conference name, or preprint server where the paper was published

doi.description: Digital Object Identifier for the paper, null if not yet assigned

keywords.description: List of keywords or key phrases describing the paper's subject areas

methodology.description: Primary research methodology or approach used

findings.description: List of key findings or contributions of the paper

datasets_used.description: Datasets referenced or used in the research

name.description: Name or identifier of the dataset

source.description: Source or repository where the dataset is available

size.description: Size description of the dataset (e.g., '10K samples', '2.5GB'), null if not specified

funding_sources.description: Organizations or grants that funded the research

citation_count.description: Number of citations the paper has received, null if unknown or not yet cited

is_peer_reviewed.description: Whether the paper has undergone peer review

code_repository.description: URL to the code repository associated with the paper, null if no code is available

references.description: Key references cited in the paper

year.description: Publication year of the referenced paper
